title: Legislative Decree No. 54 of 2018 Issuing the Law on Electronic Communications and Transactions
summary: Provides the legal foundation for electronic records and digital transactions, supporting governance, validity, and reliability of official and private electronic data records.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Establishes the legal framework for electronic communications, transactions, records, and signatures.
theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Legal foundation for electronic records, communications and signatures.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.cybercrime: Creates electronic records and electronic transactions framework.
theme_notes.digital_government.egovernment_services: Legal framework for electronic records, communications and signatures.
theme_notes.digital_government.digital_identity_trus: Legal framework for electronic signatures and electronic records.
theme_notes.digital_economy.ecommerce: Legal framework for electronic contracts and records supporting e-commerce.

notes: Related instruments: Implemented for public entities by Prime Minister Decision No. 36 of 2018
